# bounds

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/bounds"
```

Package bounds provides Chaldean decans and Egyptian/Ptolemaic terms \(bounds\), which subdivide each zodiac sign into smaller ruled segments.

CalcDecan returns the decan ruler for a given ecliptic longitude. CalcTerm returns the term/bound ruler using Ptolemaic boundaries. CalcChartFaces computes face \(decan\) assignments for all chart positions.

## Index

- [type DecanInfo](<#DecanInfo>)
  - [func CalcDecan\(lon float64\) DecanInfo](<#CalcDecan>)
- [type FaceInfo](<#FaceInfo>)
  - [func CalcChartFaces\(positions \[\]models.PlanetPosition\) \[\]FaceInfo](<#CalcChartFaces>)
- [type TermInfo](<#TermInfo>)
  - [func CalcTerm\(lon float64\) TermInfo](<#CalcTerm>)


<a name="DecanInfo"></a>
## type [DecanInfo](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/bounds/bounds.go#L8-L14>)

DecanInfo holds decan information for a position

```go
type DecanInfo struct {
    PlanetID    models.PlanetID `json:"planet_id,omitempty"`
    Sign        string          `json:"sign"`
    Decan       int             `json:"decan"` // 1, 2, or 3
    DecanRuler  models.PlanetID `json:"decan_ruler"`
    DecanDegree string          `json:"decan_degrees"` // e.g. "0-10"
}
```

<a name="FaceInfo"></a>
## type [FaceInfo](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/bounds/bounds.go#L26-L32>)

FaceInfo combines decan and term for a position

```go
type FaceInfo struct {
    PlanetID models.PlanetID `json:"planet_id"`
    Sign     string          `json:"sign"`
    SignDeg  float64         `json:"sign_degree"`
    Decan    DecanInfo       `json:"decan"`
    Term     TermInfo        `json:"term"`
}
```

<a name="TermInfo"></a>
## type [TermInfo](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/bounds/bounds.go#L17-L23>)

TermInfo holds Egyptian/Ptolemaic term information

```go
type TermInfo struct {
    PlanetID  models.PlanetID `json:"planet_id,omitempty"`
    Sign      string          `json:"sign"`
    TermRuler models.PlanetID `json:"term_ruler"`
    TermStart float64         `json:"term_start"`
    TermEnd   float64         `json:"term_end"`
}
```
